Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Enum Class MobileSecurityPolicyType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<MobileSecurityPolicyType>
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MobileSecurityPolicyType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<MobileSecurityPolicyType>, Constable
public enum MobileSecurityPolicyType extends Enum<MobileSecurityPolicyType>

Java class for MobileSecurityPolicyType

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <simpleType name="MobileSecurityPolicyType">
   <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string">
     <enumeration value="JailbrokenDevice"/>
     <enumeration value="MinimumOsVersion"/>
     <enumeration value="MaximumOsVersion"/>
     <enumeration value="MinimumSecurityPatchVersion"/>
     <enumeration value="ManInMiddle"/>
     <enumeration value="MinimumAppVersion"/>
     <enumeration value="MininumAppVersion"/>
     <enumeration value="MaximumAppVersion"/>
     <enumeration value="DevicePasscode"/>
     <enumeration value="BlockedDeviceList"/>
     <enumeration value="BlockCustomKeyboard"/>
     <enumeration value="BlockFileBackup"/>
     <enumeration value="Block3dTouch"/>
     <enumeration value="Screenshot"/>
     <enumeration value="LogScreenshot"/>
     <enumeration value="LogEmail"/>
     <enumeration value="LogPhonecall"/>
     <enumeration value="LogTextmessage"/>
     <enumeration value="LogPolicyResult"/>
     <enumeration value="BlockMicrophone"/>
     <enumeration value="BlockCamera"/>
     <enumeration value="MalwareDetection"/>
     <enumeration value="DisableUrlCaching"/>
     <enumeration value="MaxOffline"/>
     <enumeration value="LogoutAfterRestart"/>
     <enumeration value="LogoutOnBiometricChange"/>
     <enumeration value="BlockOsSharing"/>
     <enumeration value="BrowserUriScheme"/>
     <enumeration value="CheckBiometric"/>
     <enumeration value="BlockContacts"/>
     <enumeration value="BlockCalendar"/>
     <enumeration value="PhonecallUriScheme"/>
     <enumeration value="AllowedDeviceList"/>
     <enumeration value="LogCertPin"/>
   </restriction>
 </simpleType>
